case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. NESTOR TORRES NASARIO

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT NASARIO, NESTOR TORRES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-31-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $50.00 - SERVED NOV-06-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT NASARIO, NESTOR TORRES
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) ANGEL GARCIA, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
ORDER ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT IS GRANTED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NASARIO, NESTOR TORRES $2,300.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,400.00, JUDGMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $2400.00. $2300.00 PRINCIPAL AND $100.00 COSTS. ****CORRECTED JUDGMENT**** STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
AMENDED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $50.00) SERVED NOV-06-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT NASARIO, NESTOR TORRES

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-31-2019 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JAN-22-2020 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY LUPE ACEVEDO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT NESTOR TORRES NASARIO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NASARIO, NESTOR TORRES $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REMARK: RETURN MAIL. ORDER ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT MAILED TO NESTOR TORRES NASARIO -NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED/UNABLE TO FORWARD
ORDER RE: CONTINUED PER PLAINTIFF REQUEST.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-22-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC, REPRESENTED BY ANGEL GARCIA, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT NESTOR TORRES NASARIO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 01/22/20. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
